case_title: RONALD J. GARNER VS. JOYCE JORDAN et al

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF MOTION ANDMOTION TO SEAL RECORDS AND REGISTER OF ACTIONS, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY DEFENDANT JORDAN, JOYCE HEARING SET FOR MAR-16-2010 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT JOYCE JORDAN'S MOTION TO SEAL RECORDS AND REGISTER OF ACTIONS IS DENIED; C R C 2.550 AND 2.551 DO NOT ALLOW SEALING ENTIRE CASE RECORDS IN A LONG CONCLUDED CASE, NOR HAS DEFENDANT MADE AN ADEQUATE SHOWING EVEN IF THE RULES COULD APPLY. DEFENDANT DOES NOT MEET THE CRITERIA FOR SEALING OF AN UNLAWFUL DETAINER ACTION UNDER C C P SECTION 1161.2(A)(5). PREVAILING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J.
